title: Remove Unused Labels in Java
description: If a label is declared but not used in the program, it is considered as dead code and should be removed. This improves maintainability as developers will not wonder what this label is used for.
recommendation: Remove the declared labels that are not used in the program.
impact: Improves code maintainability by removing dead code.

checks.message: Remove the declared labels that are not used in the program.
